collection.method: Multi-query keyword search across Málaga province sub-regions; hybrid moving/storage operators included where types contain 'storage'; pure luggage-storage and pure moving-company listings excluded.

schema_notes.nla_m2: Net Lettable Area in square metres. NULL pending manual research per Project Veridian methodology. Populate before computing NLA-per-capita indicator.
schema_notes.municipio: LAU-level assignment derived from postal code / address; use as join key against GISCO LAU 2024 boundaries.
schema_notes.brand: Chain operator where identifiable, otherwise 'Independent'. Useful for competitive concentration analysis.
schema_notes.place_id: Google Place ID — stable identifier for re-fetching enriched data.

supply_gaps_observed: Antequera (pop ~40k, major inland logistics hub): zero true self-storage facilities; only moving companies found. Likely largest single white-space opportunity in the province.
A-357 Cártama–Álora corridor: only two facilities (both Islatrans) across ~15 km.
East of Nerja (Torrox, Frigiliana, La Herradura): no facilities found.
